description:
In this video, we simplify "ICICI Lombard Complete Health Insurance" product.

This is a detailed review of the revamped version of ICICI Lombard Complete Health Insurance with all the new features & plans for better  and comprehensive protection. 

and yes #HealthInsuranceZarooriHai
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Watch our Other videos:

- 5 Guaranteed Ways of Losing Money: https://youtu.be/pkUjNdTnHnI

comments.text: If I go to a hospital to the emergency for a sudden issue say with a stomach pain or palpitations etc… and if they do some tests like ecg or usg and give me some IV saline etc. then release me after few hours within the day, will it be considered as daycare? Can I claim those charges from this insurance? Basically here I am not admitted but treated in the emergency ward
comments.author: @pcmobitab

comments.text:
'Day-care' is the term used to describe treatment procedures that require hospitalisation for less than 24-hours.

Some treatment / procedure has to be done , only evaluation and investigation will not be covered.
comments.author: @GurleenKaurTikku

comments.text: In Day care , some surgical treatment /Diagnosis and line of treatment jas to be there.

comments.text:
Awareness comment -  I am an ICICI privilege customer since 2003. Purchased ICICI Lombard health policy for the last five years without a single rupee claim. They literally put me on my knee to renew my policy - I need to struggle to renew my health policy as I don't want to lose any no-claim bonus. After reaching all the seniors in ICICI Lombard - they renewed my health policy but didn't offer my one lakh no claim bonus. 
Sorry ICICI Lombard you have cheated me - your people who pretend to help me now vanish as I already paid my two years of the health policy premium. I suggest strongly to all new customers - there are other authentic health insurance providers, pls go to them ( do a proper survey) but don't go with this " Labad" health service provider.
comments.author: @Indian-Times

comments.text:
Hi Gurleen, I am 32 and my sister is 25. One of the benefits I want is OPD in my health insurance cover. I am confused between 2 options: 
1) health elite (INR 32973)
2) health shield with a Befit rider - Plan E (INR 19220) 

my question is - What are the OPD benefits that this rider includes? are they the same as heath elite?

which one do you recommend I should take and why ?
comments.author: @sanyamsaigal4975

comments.text:
Hi Sanyam, Health Elite has inbuilt OPD and maternity benefit that is why premium is higher.

If you are looking for only OPD coverage go for health shield with Befit rider.

Please share your email id, will share all the details of Befit and coverage scope or you can email us at info@hareepatti.com
comments.author: @GurleenKaurTikku

comments.text: DO NOT PURCHASE #icicilombard POLICY. I am holding #ICICLOMBARD Policy since 2015 for me & family. Didn`t claim any single rupees & paid hefty of premium in this 6 years - They are ready to offer me new policy but not renewing my existing valid policy as it has add on no-claim bonus. Fraud , cheating & completely unprofessional #ICICLombard. It should be name as ICICI Labad instead of #ICICILOMBARD . Purpose of this post is to aware users that stay away from any ICICI product or services. ( They cheated even I am a ICICI Privilege customer) #icicibank #icicidirect #iciciprudential #icicisecurities #ICICILABAD #ICICILombard
